ford/fiesta-st.message: The U.S. Fiesta ST ended after 2019. This page covers the final model year.

ford/focus-rs.message: The U.S. Focus RS ended after 2018. This page covers the final model year.

ford/focus.message: The U.S. Focus ended after 2018. Later global Focus years are not offered in this catalog.

ford/gt.message: Ford GT limited production has ended. This page covers the final catalog year.

chevrolet/bolt-ev.message: The Bolt EV ended after 2023. Chevrolet has signaled a return as a 2027 model.

jeep/renegade.message: The U.S. Renegade ended after 2023. This page covers the final model year.

jeep/cherokee.message: The U.S. Cherokee ended after 2023. This page covers the final model year.

chevrolet/malibu.message: The U.S. Malibu ended after 2025. This page covers the final model year.

kia/forte.message: The U.S. Forte ended after 2024. This page covers the final model year.

nissan/gt-r.message: The U.S. GT-R ended after 2025. This page covers the final model year.

bmw/m5.message: There was no 2024 M5 model year; the new generation begins in 2025.
